puzzle.hint: A sacred scripture, often referring to a divine revelation.
puzzle.verse: Al-Imran 3:3 — He has sent down upon you the Book in truth, confirming that which was before it. And He sent down the Torah and the Gospel.
puzzle.arabicVerse: نَزَّلَ عَلَيْكَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ بِٱلْحَقِّ مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَأَنزَلَ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةَ وَٱلْإِنجِيلَ
